seo_titles: Why Will AI Replace Graphic Designers Matters
The Truth About Will AI Replace Graphic Designers
What Everyone Gets Wrong About Will AI Replace Graphic Designers
The Real Story Behind Will AI Replace Graphic Designers

story.logline: A focused expert breaks down Will AI replace graphic designers with concrete evidence, objects, and topic-specific stakes, weaving in creator, workflow, automation, prompt.
clip_beats: Introduce the question: Can AI replace graphic designers? Show the creator at their desk with laptop and design tools, introduce the problem and current AI tools impacting graphic design workflows.
Demonstrate AI-assisted design in action: step-by-step creation of a graphic using AI tools integrated into the workflow, highlighting what AI automates and what requires human input.

Show final design results comparing AI-assisted work versus traditional methods, discuss which tasks remain human-driven, and offer practical takeaway on how designers can adapt and leverage AI, highlighting automation.
